race.comment: OPEN FIRE (11) is a well related Smart Missile filly who was in the market on debut in a richer maiden at Pakenham. Booted up and was there in the lead until late before being swamped. Better for it and should take catching here. I SAID SO (3) is overdue for a win. Freshened since finishing fourth latest at Pakenham. Comes back in trip and will be winding up late. HATALOOK (9) found the line nicely over 1106m at Kyneton and hit the frame. Heading in the right direction and looks hard to beat. MYWIFEISNOTHERE (4) has had a few chances but wasn't beaten far in a richer maiden latest and worth keeping safe.T ABLE
